productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Big Cat Shoe Bag Black Bags
description: Why carry your shoes in boring plastic covers when travelling? puma brings to you the funky and classy puma cat shoe bag, which you can dump in that suitcase whenever you are hopping from one flight to another. Be stylish in every detail. Length: 33.5 cm Made of 100% polyester One zippered main chamber to carry shoes Puma Jumping Cat logo across the front Haul loop on the side for handling ease Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
